code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Settings=()=>{const[apiKey,setApiKey]=useState('');const[avoidTolls,setAvoidTolls]=useState(false);const[avoidHighways,setAvoidHighways]=useState(false);const saveSettings=()=>{localStorage.setItem('googleMapsApiKey',apiKey);localStorage.setItem('avoidTolls',avoidTolls);localStorage.setItem('avoidHighways',avoidHighways);alert('Settings saved');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"settings",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Settings"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Google Maps API Key",value:apiKey,onChange:e=>setApiKey(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"checkbox",checked:avoidTolls,onChange:e=>setAvoidTolls(e.target.checked)}),"Avoid Tolls"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"checkbox",checked:avoidHighways,onChange:e=>setAvoidHighways(e.target.checked)}),"Avoid Highways"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:saveSettings,children:"Save"})]});};export default Settings;
